name: Shell
goal: Wrap a documentation or app page so it has consistent max-width, padding, and a single theme-root attribute on <html>.
description: Page-level wrapper. Clamps content width (narrow / default / wide / full), applies the project's outer padding, and propagates the active theme to the document root via data-ce-theme so token CSS resolves correctly. Should be used at most once per page.

props.name: theme
props.description: Active token bundle; written to <html data-ce-theme> on connect (and again on prop change).

props.name: width
props.description: Max container width: narrow=720px, default=1200px, wide=1440px, full=100%.

globalDependencies.purpose: Seeds data-ce-scaffold and data-ce-theme attributes that drive global token CSS.

sideEffects.description: Sets data-ce-scaffold and data-ce-theme on <html> at connect; updates data-ce-theme on theme prop change.
sideEffects.reason: Single point of theme propagation; lets tokens.css resolve without consumers configuring <html> themselves.
